name: rokket-gsd
description: The GSD Pi (OpenGSD) VS Code extension — AI coding agent with chat UI, multi-model support, 40+ tool visualizations, Telegram voice relay, parallel workers, and workflow automation. Also compatible with GSD V2.

gsd.processWrapper.description: Custom executable path to launch the GSD process. Leave empty to use the default 'gsd' command.

gsd.environmentVariables.description: Environment variables to set when launching GSD.

gsd.useCtrlEnterToSend.description: Use Ctrl/Cmd+Enter to send prompts instead of Enter. Allows Enter for newlines.

gsd.workflowDiagnostics.description: Show an on-screen diagnostic overlay for Claude Code Workflow progress. When enabled, a small heads-up panel reports whether live workflow_progress updates are arriving and whether the panel can find its anchor in the conversation. Use it to diagnose why a live workflow panel isn't appearing; leave off for normal use.

gsd.workflowLivePanel.description: Show a live floating panel of Claude Code Workflow progress as it happens. The panel is fed by watching the workflow's on-disk journal directly, so it appears mid-turn — before the workflow tool block renders in the conversation. Turn off to suppress the panel entirely.

gsd.autoUpdate.description: Automatically check for new versions on GitHub Releases.

gsd.githubToken.description: GitHub personal access token for update checks on private repos. Also reads from ROKKET_GSD_GITHUB_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN, or GITHUB_TOKEN env vars.

enumDescriptions: Phosphor — matrix-inspired green phosphor on black
Clarity — ultra-clean modern flat design, maximum readability
Forge — dark industrial metallic with inset shadows
gsd.theme.description: UI theme for the GSD panel.

gsd.telegramGroupId.description: Telegram group chat ID (set automatically by /telegram setup).

gsd.telegramChatTitle.description: Telegram group chat title (set automatically by /telegram setup).

gsd.telegramBotUsername.description: Telegram bot username (set automatically by /telegram setup).

gsd.telegramStreamingGranularity.description: Controls how GSD streams messages to Telegram (set automatically by /telegram setup).

gsd.telegramOwnerId.description: Your Telegram user ID. Only this user can trigger launch commands. Use /whoami in the group to find it.

gsd.telegramProjectDirs.description: Directories to search when launching projects from Telegram general chat. E.g. ["G:/Dropbox/Rocket Social/Rokketek/Software"].

gsd.voiceTranscriptionProvider.description: Which provider to use for voice-to-text transcription.

gsd.azureSpeechRegion.description: Azure region for Speech Services (e.g. eastus, westus2, westeurope).

commands.title: Rokket GSD: Open in New Tab
Rokket GSD: Open in Side Bar
Rokket GSD: Set OpenAI API Key

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview
